description_long: This is a modern, military-style airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and sharply swept wings, finished in a matte dark green color. The wings are mid-mounted and feature a pronounced sweep, giving the aircraft a stealthy, aggressive profile. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy that suggests a single-seat configuration. The tail section is equipped with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail design. The landing gear is deployed, with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear, all appearing to be fixed. The overall design emphasizes aerodynamic efficiency and maneuverability, typical of advanced fighter jets.
description: A dark green, modern military-style airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. The aircraft features fixed tricycle landing gear and a sleek, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Left-front angled view highlighting the angular fuselage, cockpit placement, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the exhaust area between the tail fins.
description_view_3: Right-rear angled view emphasizing the swept wings, H-tail configuration, and the fixed landing gear under the wings and nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine, visible exhaust at the tail.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear, all fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy at the front of the fuselage.
